finance_snapshot.total_before_tax: Starting MSRP about $38,495 before tax, destination, and dealer fees.
finance_snapshot.finance_payment: Equivalent to $13.33 per $1,000 financed per Subaru's current national offer text.
finance_snapshot.finance_down_payment: No down payment required per the current Subaru offer disclaimer.
finance_snapshot.lease_payment: Subaru says lease offers are available, but exact Solterra lease-payment figures were not exposed in the static HTML captured here.
finance_snapshot.due_at_signing: Varies by location and lease structure.
finance_snapshot.incentives: Subaru's current special-offers page says that through March 31, 2026, buyers can get 0% APR for 75 months on a new 2026 Solterra and that the offer includes a $2,000 retail customer cash rebate.
finance_snapshot.warranty: Subaru's current warranty booklet states basic coverage at 3 years/36,000 miles. For battery-electric models, powertrain coverage is 5 years/60,000 miles, and the battery and electric drive units are covered for 8 years/100,000 miles.
finance_snapshot.best_for: EV shoppers who want standard AWD and one of the clearest current national finance offers in this dataset.
finance_snapshot.financial_strengths: This is one of the few entries where the OEM publicly exposes a strong national finance offer, which materially improves payment predictability.
finance_snapshot.financial_concerns: The special offer is explicitly tied to 2026 Solterra inventory and location availability; exact lease terms were not exposed.
finance_snapshot.notes: Snapshot uses Subaru US pricing and offer text on March 25, 2026. The public offer page references 2026 Solterra retail support, while the research list tracked a 2025 brochure.

image_strategy.note: Dataset stores one canonical local image per vehicle.
